summary: Banner feature testing COMPLETE for 'Ataque y Remate' promotional banner on StudentHomePage. All 11 test cases PASSED. Banner displays correctly with lazy-loaded image, dark overlay, 'Ver programa' button, correct responsive heights, and navigation to /curso on click.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, all data is MOCKED)

login_as_alumno.details: Click data-testid='demo-enter-btn' on welcome screen works. Alumno role pre-selected. Navigates to /inicio

banner_visibility.details: Banner with data-testid='ataque-remate-banner' is visible on /inicio page

banner_image.details: Image src contains 'Ataque%20y%20Remate', loading='lazy' attribute present, object-fit:cover with object-position center-right

dark_overlay.details: Dark overlay div with bg-black/35 class exists (rgba(0,0,0,0.35))

ver_programa_button.details: data-testid='ver-programa-btn' visible at bottom-left, has bg-white/90 text-primary rounded-3xl shadow-md classes

banner_click_navigation.details: Clicking banner navigates to /curso (course landing page)

layout_order_mobile.details: On mobile (390px): Banner appears AFTER progress bar (header) and BEFORE course card ('Nuevo curso disponible')

layout_order_desktop.details: On desktop (1920px): Same order maintained with sidebar visible

banner_border_radius.details: Banner has rounded-2xl class (16px border radius)

no_extra_text_overlay.details: Only 'Ver programa' button text found on banner - no extra overlaid text

test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo app with role selection (Alumno pre-selected)

mocked_api.details: Entire app is frontend-only prototype with no backend. All data is hardcoded.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner feature verified working on StudentHomePage. Banner appears in layout order: Header > Progress > Banner > Course card > Train/Challenges > Daily goal. All responsive breakpoints working. Image loads with lazy loading. Click navigates to /curso.
